panels.title: R2 up
panels.description: Live HeadBucket probe from the API (powerlog_r2_up). N/A when not on R2 — dev uses filesystem.

panels.title: Span call rate (calls/s)
panels.description: From Tempo metrics_generator span-metrics. Populates once traffic flows after enabling the generator.

panels.title: Service graph req rate (req/s)
panels.description: Edges of the service graph (client → server) derived from traces.

panels.title: GC time (s/s)
panels.description: Seconds spent in GC per second, by collection kind.

options.content: Alloy ships every **Docker container's** stdout to Loki. The container API now logs **JSON** (Pino on a non-TTY stdout), so the app panels parse structured fields and **level**; non-app containers (postgres, grafana, …) log plain text. **trace_id** links to the trace in Tempo and **correlationId** opens related logs (datasource derived fields).

panels.title: Refresh outcomes (ev/s)
panels.description: rotated = normal rotation · reuse_detected = a revoked token was replayed (security) · invalid = missing/expired token.

panels.title: Connection pool
panels.description: pg pool sampled at scrape time. waiting > 0 means the app is queuing for a connection (pool at max) — the saturation signal the server-side exporter can't see.

panels.title: R2 op rate (ops/s)
panels.description: Calls the API makes to R2 (avatar put/get/delete). Only emits when AVATAR_STORAGE=r2 — empty in dev (filesystem).

panels.title: Send latency p95 (s)
panels.description: Latency of the Resend API / SMTP send call.

panels.title: Delivery events (ev/s)
panels.description: Resend webhook events (delivered/bounced/complained/opened/clicked). Needs the webhook configured + RESEND_WEBHOOK_SECRET.

panels.title: Bounces & complaints (ev/s)
panels.description: Deliverability red flags. Sustained values hurt sender reputation.

panels.title: Domain verified
panels.description: Resend sending domain verification, polled via the API key. No data → not on Resend (dev) or probe not run.

panels.title: Resend API up
panels.description: Resend API reachable with the configured API key (list domains succeeds).

panels.title: Email log (sends + delivery events)
panels.description: PII-free email feed from the app: 'email dispatched'/'email send failed' (MeteredMailer) + 'resend webhook event' (delivery webhook). No recipients or subjects.

targets.expr: {service="api"} | json | msg=~"email dispatched|email send failed|resend webhook event"
